hops.context: Carlos Melo, Jamilson Dantas, Paulo Pereira and Paulo Maciel
This paper proposes a set of models to evaluate the computing infrastructure that provides blockchain-as-a-service.
This paper proposes a set of models to evaluate the computing infrastructure that provides blockchain-as-a-service.

question: Which of the following best describes the purpose of the models developed by Carlos Melo and his team in the paper?

options.A: To evaluate the computing infrastructure that provides blockchain-as-a-service.
options.B: To compare different blockchain platforms for personal use efficiency.
options.C: To determine the environmental impact of blockchain technologies worldwide.
options.D: To assess the financial viability of blockchain implementations in small businesses.

explanation: The paper specifically mentions that the models developed by Carlos Melo and his team are intended to evaluate the computing infrastructure for blockchain-as-a-service. The other options, while plausible in the context of blockchain, do not align with the specific purpose of the models as described in the paper.
